error.wrong_device: The device at this address is not the same unit (MAC mismatch). Use the correct IP or add a new device.

user.description:
Enter the IP address of your Daikin AC.
Polling interval is how often Home Assistant refreshes data from the unit (same value is used when testing the connection).
user.title: Configure Daikin AC

reconfigure.description: Update the IP address or polling interval.
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Daikin AC

data.auto_history_sync: Hourly auto-sync of energy statistics to the recorder
data.insert_missing: Allow inserting missing hourly statistics rows
data.history_skip_extra_hours: Additional hours to skip (current hour is always skipped)
data.history_hours_to_correct: Number of previous hours to correct

init.description: Polling interval overrides the value from initial setup when set. For BRP069 adapters, polling can be split into domains: state (sensor/control) and energy (day/week power) with separate intervals. Auto history sync uses the same schedule as polling: after each successful sensor refresh, LTS correction is attempted at most once per local hour (retried on the next poll if it fails). Insert missing: when correcting history, allow creating LTS rows for hours that do not exist yet (may rarely conflict with the recorder; services can override per call).
init.title: Daikin AC options

sync_history.name: Sync energy history
sync_history.description: Corrects energy statistics using historical data from the Daikin unit (Today and Yesterday).

days_ago.name: Days ago
days_ago.description: Number of days back to sync (0 for Today, 1 for Yesterday).

entity_id.name: Target sensor (optional)
entity_id.description: If set, only this Daikin energy sensor is updated.

insert_missing.name: Insert missing hourly rows
insert_missing.description: If off (default), only hours that already have long-term statistics are updated, avoiding duplicate-row errors with the recorder. Turn on to backfill gaps.

history_skip_extra_hours.name: Additional hours to skip
history_skip_extra_hours.description: Optional override for this run. Extra hours to skip after the current hour; total skip = 1 + this value. If set (alone or with hours to correct), values are not clamped to a minimum.

history_hours_to_correct.name: Hours to correct
history_hours_to_correct.description: Optional override for this run. Number of completed local hours to correct. If set (alone or with additional skip), values are not clamped.

sync_total_history.name: Sync total energy history
sync_total_history.description: Corrects the total/compressor energy history (use sparingly).

entity_id.name: Target total sensor (optional)
entity_id.description: Limit the fix to one total-energy entity.

insert_missing.name: Insert missing hourly rows
insert_missing.description: Same as sync_history: default off updates only existing LTS hours; on inserts missing hours (may conflict with recorder compilation).

history_skip_extra_hours.name: Additional hours to skip
history_skip_extra_hours.description: Same as sync_history: optional override; total skip = 1 + this value. Unclamped when set.

history_hours_to_correct.name: Hours to correct
history_hours_to_correct.description: Same as sync_history: optional override. Unclamped when set.

zone_hvac_mode_unsupported.message: Zone temperature can only be changed when the main climate mode is heat or cool.

zone_hvac_read_only.message: Zone HVAC mode is controlled by the main climate entity.

zone_inactive.message: Zone {zone_id} is not active. Enable the zone on your Daikin device first.

zone_missing.message: Zone {zone_id} does not exist. Available zones are 0-{max_zone}.

zone_parameters_unavailable.message: This device does not expose the required zone temperature parameters.

zone_set_failed.message: Failed to set zone temperature. The device may not support this operation.

zone_temperature_missing.message: Provide a temperature value when adjusting a zone.
